author: Romeer Pillay
name: PR1855 base + activation-aware GPTQ mixed precision (step-matched)
blurb: PR #1855 base training recipe with activation-aware mixed-precision GPTQ. Groups are scored by act_rms * mean(abs(weight)) and one salient 64-column group is quantized at int8 inside the same full-tensor GPTQ solve, with stock PR1855 LQER on top. Results are reported on matched seed/step reruns against PR #1855 to isolate quantization quality under reproduction variance.
technique_summary: Activation-aware mixed-precision GPTQ on PR1855 base; selection score = act_rms * mean(abs(weight)); one salient 64-column group protected at int8 inside the GPTQ solve; stock PR1855 LQER on top; matched-step seed suite.
